# Phantom Tac Toe — llms.txt

> Phantom Tac Toe is an infinite 3D tic-tac-toe browser game with WebGL graphics,
> real-time multiplayer, and a GenZ-inspired neon dark design.

## About

Phantom Tac Toe reimagines classic tic-tac-toe with an infinite twist: each player
can only have three pieces on the board at once. When a 4th piece is placed,
the oldest one fades away automatically, eliminating draws forever and
creating an endlessly replayable game.

## Features

- 3D WebGL game board with neon glow effects (Three.js)
- Infinite mode: no draws — oldest piece fades after 3 per player
- AI opponent with Easy, Medium, and Hard difficulty (minimax algorithm)
- Local 2P multiplayer on same device
- Online multiplayer via peer-to-peer WebRTC (PeerJS)
- Reward system with XP, levels, achievements, and coins
- Cosmetic shop (board themes)
- Daily login rewards with streak bonuses
- Fully offline PWA — works without internet
- Sound effects, haptic feedback, and smooth animations
- Mobile-first responsive design

## Technology

- Frontend: Vanilla JavaScript (ES modules), Vite build tool
- 3D: Three.js for WebGL rendering
- Multiplayer: PeerJS (WebRTC peer-to-peer)
- Audio: Web Audio API
- PWA: Service Worker with offline caching
- No server backend required — the game runs entirely in the browser

## How to Play

1. Choose a game mode: Solo (vs AI), Local Duel (2P same device), or Online Battle
2. Take turns placing X or O on the 3D board
3. Each player's pieces are limited to 3 on the board
4. Placing a 4th piece removes the oldest — making every game winnable
5. Get three in a row to win

## Links

- Homepage: https://phantomtactoe.mreshank.com
- Play Now: https://phantomtactoe.mreshank.com/#/play/solo
